abstract: Summary Discover how, why, and if your business should be leveraging generative AI like ChatGPT, looking at both the promise and perils associated with monetizing this emerging technology. Register for this Webcast at: https://ibm.webcasts.com/starthere.jsp?ei=1602956&tp key=ea866bfe71 During the session, our experts will discuss: Innovations like Foundation Models, and Generative AI that drove the phenomenal success of services such as OpenAI’s ChatGPT, and DALL-E. Learn how they differ from existing AI offerings. Real-world use cases of how enterprises are already deriving business value from Generative AI. Understand the potential challenges such as bias, hallucination, security, IP, cost, and more. How enterprises can responsibly and securely deploy these models at scale. Join IBM Consulting as we share our point-of-view around how enterprises can best drive value from Generative AI & Foundation Models in a responsible way and scale it across your business. You will gain an understanding of real-world client examples, business potential, and how to mitigate the pitfalls of this new AI technology. Key Speakers: Manish Goyal , VP & Sr. Partner, Global AI & Analytics Leader, IBM Consulting Shobhit Varshney , VP & Sr. Partner, Americas AI Analytics Leader Consulting
event_title: What does ChatGPT mean for business? - Drive disruptive value with Generative AI
title: What does ChatGPT mean for business? - Drive disruptive value with Generative AI
